prompt: An uncanny, abstract topological study of a sleek geometric cylindrical bundle suspended in a stark, shadowless void. Not a standard photograph, but a surreal, physically impossible optical illusion. The macro-structure of the bundle features deep, heavy grooves that spiral sharply downwards from top-left to bottom-right, creating a severe negative global slope. However, every individual micro-fiber composing the bundle is impossibly woven to slash aggressively upwards from bottom-left to top-right, creating a severe positive local slope. The micro-texture visually fights the macro-structure, creating intense cognitive dissonance, vertigo, and a profound sense of geometric wrongness. High-contrast monochromatic lighting, hyper-crisp abstract geometry. Absolutely no text, numbers, charts, or real-world industrial settings.
visual_logic: The macro-structure spirals aggressively downward (negative global slope), while every constituent micro-fiber cuts sharply upward (positive local slope). This impossible geometric tension physically embodies the local-versus-aggregate trend reversal.
